name: Ripple End
description: Last concentric ring reaching the shore and vanishing

prompts.label: last concentric ripple reaching shore and vanishing
prompts.text: last concentric ripple reaching shore and vanishing, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: water ring expanding to stillness with gentle fade
prompts.text: water ring expanding to stillness with gentle fade, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: surface disturbance settling into glassy calm
prompts.text: surface disturbance settling into glassy calm, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: pond surface returning to mirror perfection
prompts.text: pond surface returning to mirror perfection, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.text: final wave crest dissolving into smooth water, lo-fi cassette hiss and bloom, shimmer reverb pad wash, moonlight through frosted glass, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, smooth fade out
